## What

Closes #<issue-number>

## Subproject

<!-- e.g. saucedemo, automationintesting, pact-practice -->

## How to verify

<!-- e.g. `npx playwright test --project=saucedemo` -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Test runs locally and passes: `npx playwright test --project=<site>`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] PR title/branch reference the issue being closed
- [ ] No `test.only` / `.skip` left in the diff
